query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "mcompassrag: topic metadata as a semantic compass for paragraph-level " linguistics
rationale: The paper focuses on image generation and visual patch retrieval, which is an off-domain application compared to the user's question regarding paragraph-level text retrieval and linguistic topic metadata. While both involve "Retrieval Augmented Generation" (RAG), the specific mechanisms (visual patches vs. semantic text topics) and domains (computer vision vs. linguistics) are distinct, failing the criteria for same-mechanism evidence or shared empirical population.
